summary: TWO_COLUMN stacked vertically: top time-axes with a YELLOW spike at t=a (driven by ValueTracker a_tr), bottom Laplace-axes plotting F(s) = e^(-a s) as GREEN curve with RED dashed cursor at s=1 showing F(1) = e^(-a). a_tr tours through 0.5, 2.0, 3.5, 1.0, 2.5. Live panel links shift-in-t to scaling-of-F.
